_comment: Ratchet config for scripts/codecharta-ratchet.py, run against the CodeCharta map (ortus.cc.json.gz). Two gates over the ccsh 'complexity' metric + go coverage. Ratchet by LOWERING the numbers as the code improves; RAISING a baseline entry needs review justification.

complexity._default_cap_note: Every file not listed below must stay <= this. Current highest non-baseline file is 40 (internal/adapters/storage/http.go).

hotspot._note: A file is a hotspot when it is complex AND under-tested; new hotspots fail the build. Grandfathered files below are the current ones — remove them from 'allow' as their coverage improves.
